landing.builtForIndian: Built for Indian Tiffin & Mess Owners
landing.heroDesc: Stop using notebooks. Track customers, record payments, manage meal pauses, and send WhatsApp reminders — all from your phone.
landing.noCreditCard: No credit card required · Free to start · Works on mobile
landing.everythingYouNeed: Everything you need to manage your tiffin business
landing.startFreeGrow: Start free, grow as you need
landing.fullAccess: Full access to all features during trial period.
landing.readyToDigitize: Ready to digitize your tiffin business?
landing.joinOwners: Join tiffin and mess owners who stopped using notebooks and started managing smarter.
landing.startFreeNoCc: Start Free Trial — No Credit Card
landing.footerDesc: The digital register for Indian tiffin & mess businesses.
landing.featureCustomerMgmtDesc: Add customers in under 30 seconds. Track name, mobile, address, meal plan, and subscription details — all from your phone.
landing.featurePaymentRecDesc: Record cash, UPI, or bank payments instantly. Auto-renew subscriptions on full payment. Track partial payments too.
landing.featureMealPauseDesc: Track skipped meal days and extend subscriptions automatically. No more confusion about who paused when.
landing.featureDueAlertsDesc: Know which customers are due or overdue at a glance. Never forget to collect payments again.
landing.featureWhatsappDesc: Send payment and due reminders directly via WhatsApp with one tap. Pre-filled messages ready to go.
landing.featureRevenueDesc: See monthly collections, pending amounts, and revenue trends. Understand your business in 5 seconds.
landing.benefitNotebooksDesc: Replace your manual register with a clean digital system.
landing.benefitPaymentsDesc: Track every rupee with automatic due date alerts.
landing.benefitMealPauseDesc: Handle off-days without confusion or lost revenue.
landing.benefitMobileDesc: Designed mobile-first for tiffin owners on the go.
landing.faq1q: Is this a payment app? Do I need a payment gateway?
landing.faq1a: No! TrackBook only records payments. When a customer pays you via UPI, cash, or bank, you simply record it here. No payment gateway needed.
landing.faq2a: When a customer pauses meals, you add the pause dates. Later, you can "settle" those days and the subscription automatically extends by that many days.
landing.faq3q: Can I use this on my phone?
landing.faq3a: Yes! TrackBook is designed mobile-first. Everything works smoothly on Android and iOS browsers.
landing.faq4a: Tap the WhatsApp button next to any customer — it opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message including their name, due date, and amount. Just hit send.
landing.faq5a: Yes. Your data is stored securely on enterprise-grade servers. Each business can only see their own customers and payments.
landing.faq6q: How many customers can I manage?
landing.faq6a: TrackBook works smoothly for 10 to 300+ customers. Perfect for small to medium tiffin and mess businesses.
